code:
import string

fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut num = n
  mut result = ""
  while num >= 10
    result = "#{result}X"
    num = num - 10
  end
  if num >= 9
    result = "#{result}IX"
    num = num - 9
  else if num >= 5
    result = "#{result}V"
    num = num - 5
  else if num >= 4
    result = "#{result}IV"
    num = num - 4
  end
  while num >= 1
    result = "#{result}I"
    num = num - 1
  end
  result
end

println(to_roman(4))
println(to_roman(9))
println(to_roman(27))
println(to_roman(39))
